title: Fix subagent log scroll to bottom

log.context: Fix subagent log scroll to bottom

Done. What changed:

**Root cause:** `renderOutputPane` did a full `innerHTML` replacement on every SSE message. This resets `scrollTop` to 0 before the auto-scroll assignment, causing a visible flash back to top each time a line arrived.

**Fix in `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py`:**

1. Added `appendOutputLine(outputEl, line)` — appends a `<span>` to the DOM directly, preserving existing scroll position. Checks `isScrolledToBottom()` before appending; only scrolls to bottom if user hasn't manuall...(truncated)
